name: Shell Extension Hijacking
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: Shell extensions loaded by Explorer on every start. ShellExecuteHooks fire on every ShellExecute call.
forensic_value: Any CLSID in ShellExecuteHooks or OverlayIdentifiers pointing to an unsigned DLL in a non-standard location is suspicious.
